content: Next.js 16 Cache Components (the PPR successor): enable via next.config.ts cacheComponents:true. Use 'use cache' directive on async functions/components/pages with cacheLife() (profiles like 'hours','max') for time-based and cacheTag() for tag-based invalidation. For dynamic per-request content (related posts, view counts) do NOT use 'use cache'; wrap the component in <Suspense> with a fallback so the prerendered static shell (post body) streams immediately and dynamic parts stream in at request time. fetch supports next:{tags:[...]} for tag-based caching. revalidateTag(tag,'max') and updateTag are the invalidation primitives.
